parameters.query:
SELECT jsonb_build_object(
 'brief', (SELECT content FROM briefs WHERE audience = 'leadership' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1),
 'kpis', jsonb_build_object(
   'calls', (SELECT count(*) FROM calls WHERE call_date > now() - interval '7 days'),
   'signals', (SELECT count(*) FROM signals WHERE created_at > now() - interval '7 days'),
   'accounts', (SELECT count(DISTINCT account_id) FROM calls WHERE call_date > now() - interval '7 days' AND account_id IS NOT NULL)),
 'people', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(y.j) FROM (
   SELECT jsonb_build_object('name', n.name, 'calls', count(DISTINCT c.id), 'accounts', count(DISTINCT c.account_id)) AS j
   FROM calls c CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_object_keys(COALESCE(c.speaker_stats, '{}'::jsonb)) AS n(name)
   WHERE c.call_date > now() - interval '7 days'
   GROUP BY n.name ORDER BY count(DISTINCT c.id) DESC LIMIT 4) y), '[]'::jsonb),
 'by_account', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(x.j) FROM (
   SELECT jsonb_build_object('account', a.name, 'type', s.type, 'summary', left(s.summary, 170), 'band', s.details->>'band') AS j
   FROM signals s JOIN accounts a ON a.id = s.account_id
   WHERE s.created_at > now() - interval '7 days'
   ORDER BY a.name, s.created_at DESC LIMIT 60) x), '[]'::jsonb)
) AS ctx;

parameters.content:
## 16 · Slack weekly report
Formats the ALREADY-GENERATED leadership brief (workflow 13) + this week's signals into a Slack message. No model call - deterministic, rate-limit-proof, always matches the dashboard.

**Setup (one-time, ~5 min) - native Slack node:**
1. api.slack.com/apps -> Create New App -> From scratch -> name it `tnAI` -> pick the workspace
2. OAuth & Permissions -> Bot Token Scopes -> add: `chat:write`, `im:write`, `users:read`
3. Install to Workspace -> copy the **Bot User OAuth Token** (starts `xoxb-`)
4. In n8n: Credentials -> New -> **Slack API** -> paste the token
5. Open the **Send to Slack** node -> pick the credential -> in "Send Message To" leave **User** and pick yourself from the dropdown
6. Run once manually to test - the DM arrives from the tnAI app

Later, to post to a leadership channel instead: invite the app to the channel (`/invite @tnAI`), switch "Send Message To" to Channel and pick it.

Runs Mondays 08:00 - ten minutes after workflow 13 writes the fresh brief.

user.cachedResultName: pick yourself after adding the credential
